# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

As ApiCortex is currently in active development, valid security support is provided for the latest version only.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability in ApiCortex, please do **NOT** open a public issue.

Instead, please report it via email to:

**[mail@0xarchit.is-a.dev](mailto:mail@0xarchit.is-a.dev)**

Please include:
- A description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce the issue.
- Potential impact.

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and work to address the issue as quickly as possible.
